coreMeaning: adds emphasis; something is more extreme or surprising than expected
coreImage: 把结果再抬高一级的强调杠杆
meaning: adds emphasis; something is more extreme or surprising than expected
fable: 有台机器人厨师挑战所有料理，八层蛋糕都做成功了，even 连最难的分子料理也掌握了。观众刚要鼓掌，它又把一粒米雕成城堡。大家终于明白：even 是把惊讶再往上推一格。
moral: even 用来强调超出预期的程度，让事情显得更强、更极端或更意外。
memoryHook: even 本意像一条平线；作强调副词时，可以想象它把原来的水平线再往上推一格。这是记忆钩子，不是词源解释。
anchorSentence: This approach is even more efficient than I expected.
collocations: even better / even worse / even faster
activeChunks: even though the deadline was tight
personalExample: This review method is even more useful when I turn each word into a reusable sentence pattern.
notes: even as an emphasizing adverb usually goes before the word or phrase it modifies: She didn't even reply. Use even + comparative for stronger comparison: even better, even more efficient. even though means although; even if means whether or not.
recallQuestions: 机器人连最难的分子料理也掌握了，这个把惊讶再往上推一格的词是什么？
even more efficient 中 even 修饰的是哪个部分？
用 even though 写一句和工作或学习有关的英文句子。
